notes: z19/z18 show house, driveway, surrounding treed lot/backyard context together; z20 is too tight/obscured by trees. Google quality decent but tree canopy/shadows limit detail; roughly typical to slightly better than many Mapbox/Bing rural sheets.

House and lot are visible, but dense trees and shadows obscure backyard/usable land; z18 gives broader context but less property detail. Google quality is usable but not clearly better than typical Mapbox/Bing due to canopy obstruction.

Clear top-down view of house, yard, neighboring lots, road access, and open lot context; z20 good for structure, z19 best balance. Google quality appears better than typical Mapbox/Bing here: sharp, bright, low obstruction.

z19/z18 show the building cluster, parking/drive areas, and surrounding lot context; some shadows/trees obscure details and z20 is too tight. Google quality is comparable to typical Mapbox/Bing, perhaps slightly better in urban context.

z19 clearly shows house, yard, street frontage, driveway/parking, and neighboring context; z18 adds block context. Google quality is strong and likely better than typical Mapbox/Bing for this location.

z19 best balances house/lot context; z20 is too tight/soft and z18 adds neighborhood context. Backyard/lot partly obscured by trees. Google quality is roughly typical to slightly better than Mapbox/Bing for this rural/resort area.

Crosshair appears on a rocky/cleared area with no clear house at the coordinate; surrounding lots/roads visible at z19/z18 but not a useful house + backyard view. Google quality is adequate, likely comparable to typical Mapbox/Bing, but subject visibility is poor.

z19 gives the best scale, but the target area is heavily tree-covered and the house/yard boundaries are not clearly visible. z18 helps with neighborhood context only. Google quality is acceptable but not clearly better than Mapbox/Bing due to canopy obstruction.

z19 clearly shows nearby houses, road frontage, and lot/yard context; z20 is tighter and less contextual, z18 broader. Google quality appears good and likely better than typical Mapbox/Bing for this sheet.

z19 provides the clearest usable elevated/top-down view of buildings and lot context; z20 is blurry/cropped with a black band, z18 is useful for broader context. Google quality is mixed—z19 decent, z20 worse than typical Mapbox/Bing.
